title: Morgan Stanley Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: Morgan Stanley reported record first quarter 2026 results, with net revenues of $20.6 billion, up from $17.7 billion a year earlier. Net income applicable to Morgan Stanley was $5.6 billion, or $3.43 per diluted share, compared with $4.3 billion, or $2.60 per diluted share, in the prior-year quarter. Return on tangible common equity was 27.1%, and the expense efficiency ratio improved to 65%. Institutional Securities generated record net revenues of $10.7 billion, supported by strong investment banking, equity, and fixed income results. Wealth Management also delivered record net revenues of $8.5 billion, with a 30.4% pre-tax margin, $118.4 billion of net new assets, and $53.7 billion of fee-based asset flows. Investment Management reported net revenues of $1.5 billion and assets under management or supervision of $1.868 trillion. These results are useful evidence because they show strong market-sensitive revenue, continued wealth management asset growth, and high profitability.
